THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 65 BEAVER ST, SF, CA, LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT DELIVERS TO OFFICE OF PLTF ATTY $5580.00 BY 10AM 5/12/94 IN CERTIFIED FUNDS, AND A FULLY EXECUTED LEASE PLTF WILL SET ASIDE JUDGMENT AND DISMISS THIS ACTION. SEE FURTHER JUDGMENT FOR DETAILS.
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LOFTUS, VIOLA AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, RICHARD DOES 1 TO X SUMMONS ISSUED
